bird.name: White-crested guan
bird.summary: The white-crested guan (Penelope pileata) is a species of bird in the family Cracidae, the chachalacas, guans, and curassows. It is found o…

relations.subject: White-crested guan
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat destruction and in 2012, the species was recategorised by the International Union for Conservation of Nature, its conservation status being raised to vulnerable
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
